privileged_info_summary: The generate_fleet_summary task requires an agent to query an Aerobridge SQLite database and generate a text report at /home/ga/Documents/fleet_summary.txt containing four mandatory sections (OPERATORS, AIRCRAFT, PERSONNEL, SUMMARY). Aerobridge is an open-source Django-based drone fleet management system. The environment database is populated with official Aerobridge fixture data containing 5 companies, 2 aircraft, and 5 persons. The task uses a Django ORM to extract ground truth data from the database for verification. All metadata claims in task.json (output path and required section headers) are consistent across the task definition, setup scripts, and verifier code.
